goal: full TC4 aspect base and research table foundation
implemented: Aspect enum replaced with full 48-aspect TC4 base.
Original aspect icons copied from TC4 jar to textures/aspects and item/aspect_* aliases.
AspectCombinationRegistry added with original component combinations.
PlayerAspectKnowledge added for discovered aspects and aspect pool.
ResearchTableFoundation added for primal seeding and aspect combination/discovery.
ResearchTableBlock now requires paper + scribing tools with ink to prepare notes.
ResearchTableScreen now displays the full 48-aspect base instead of only six primals.
not_yet_final: Research table GUI still needs real network packet for server-side aspect combination from clicks.
Original TC4 research minigame/linking notes is not fully implemented yet.
Thaumonomicon pages need exact original data tree.
Scribing tools refill recipe/ink sac behavior needs recipe integration.
Aspect database per-item values are foundation rules, not every exact TC4 object tag.
